# Site Command Center v37

This release completes the public website navigation layer without removing prior pages.

## What changed

- New homepage command center.
- New complete Site Atlas.
- Global Site Command palette on every public HTML page.
- Preserved v36 homepage as `archive-v36-ascension-chamber.html`.
- Machine-readable navigation map at `site-navigation-map.json`.
- Data-Zero/public-safe posture remains intact.

## User posture

The public website remains browser-local, account-free, analytics-free, cookie-free, form-free, wallet-free, token-route-free, and production-authority-free.
